webApp.description: Testomniac is an AI-powered web application testing platform that discovers pages, generates test cases, and finds issues automatically.

home.name: How to Test Your Web App with Testomniac
home.description: Get started with automated web application testing using Testomniac's AI-powered scanner.

steps.name: Enter Your URL
steps.text: Paste the URL of the web application you want to test into the scan form on the homepage.

steps.name: Start the Scan
steps.text: Click the scan button to begin. Testomniac will automatically discover pages, detect components, and map your application.

steps.name: Review Generated Tests
steps.text: Once the scan completes, review the AI-generated test cases, test suites, and personas created for your application.

steps.name: Analyze Results
steps.text: Explore the dashboard to view test run results, detected issues, discovered pages, and component inventory.
